parameters.name: crname
parameters.label: Group Name
parameters.description: The name of the group to be created. The default name is set to match the name of the .

parameters.name: entity
parameters.label: Entity
parameters.description: Primitives or Points.

parameters.name: geotype
parameters.label: Geometry Type
parameters.description: Select the geometry type group. The selection will only pertain to the geometry type specified. e.g. If you only wanted to group polygons.

parameters.name: usenumber
parameters.label: Use Number
parameters.description: Allows selection of grouping of entities by number. When the Enable button is Active, the selection options become active and can be used to select entities. The fields available are listed below.

parameters.name: ordered
parameters.label: Create Ordered
parameters.description: When selected, elements in the group are traversed in the order they are selected; otherwise they are traversed in creation order.

parameters.name: groupop
parameters.label: Operation
parameters.description: When the Number Enable button is checked, this option groups entities based on a defined Pattern or by a Range.

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.label: Pattern
parameters.description: Activated when Operation is set to by Pattern. In this field, enter the range of primitives to select. The required syntax is "S.P", where S is the index of the parent surface, and P the profile index

parameters.name: transfer
parameters.label: Transfer Selection to Pattern
parameters.description: This allows you to define the range of points / primitives visually by selecting them in the Viewport with the Select state. Clicking this button transfers the selected points/primitives into the Patt

parameters.name: filter
parameters.label: Filter Expression
parameters.description: The Filter provided is evaluated for every point/primitive. Wherever it is true, the entity is added. All the local variables of point and primitive are present, though only accessable when the right

parameters.name: usebounds
parameters.label: Use Bounds
parameters.description: This option is used for selecting entities based on bounding volumes: Bounding Box, or Bounding Sphere. When Active, the selection options become active and can be used to select entities. The fields

parameters.name: boundtype
parameters.label: Bounding Type
parameters.description: Selects the type of bounding volume to use

parameters.name: usenormal
parameters.label: Use Normal
parameters.description: This option is used for selecting entities based on the angle of the entity normals. When the Active, the selection options become active and can be used to select entities. The fields available are l

parameters.name: angle
parameters.label: Spread Angle
parameters.description: The value entered in this field generates an angle of deviation from the primary axis. This can be visualized as a cone where the radius of the base of the cone is defined by the Spread Angle and the

parameters.name: camera
parameters.label: Backface from
parameters.description: This menu allows you to select an object. Typically, a camera object would be chosen. The primitives which are backface when viewed from the object specified will be grouped or selected.

parameters.name: useedges
parameters.label: Use Edges
parameters.description: Allows you to group primitives by edges.

parameters.name: doangle
parameters.label: Edge Angle
parameters.description: Enables the Edge Angle parameter.

parameters.name: edgeangle
parameters.label: Edge Angle
parameters.description: Specifies an angle between edges in which to group. Works only for primitive groups.

parameters.name: dodepth
parameters.label: Edge Depth
parameters.description: Enables the Edge Depth parameter.

parameters.name: edgestep
parameters.label: Edge Depth
parameters.description: Enter the depth of the edge (only for point groups).

parameters.name: point
parameters.label: Point Number
parameters.description: Enter the specific point numbers (only for point groups).

parameters.name: unshared
parameters.label: Unshared Edges
parameters.description: When selecting points, this option selects the points of a ploygonal mesh which appear on the boundary (i.e. those which are not shared) for inclusion in the group, and orders them. In addition to pol

parameters.name: boundarygroups
parameters.label: Create Boundary Groups
parameters.description: When selecting points with the Unshared Edges parameter, this option becomes available. Enabling it creates new groups of the form: <name>__< n> , (two underscores) where the < name> is the Name speci

parameters.name: grpequal
parameters.label: Group =
parameters.description: Specify the group whose members you wish to edit. This can be one of the input groups or a new group created in this specified in the Name parameter on the page.

parameters.name: not1
parameters.label: Not
parameters.description: When Off, include the members of the group specified in 1 parameter below. When On, include all members that are not part of the group specified in 1 parameter below.

parameters.name: grp1
parameters.label: Group 1
parameters.description: Select one of the input groups to start with, noting the setting of the Not (not1) parameter above.

parameters.name: op1
parameters.label: Operation
parameters.description: Select the operation used to combine the group specified in 1 parameter with the group specified in 2 parameter.

parameters.name: not2
parameters.label: Not
parameters.description: When Off, include the members of the group specified in 2 parameter below. When On, include all members that are not part of the group specified in 2 parameter below.

parameters.name: grp2
parameters.label: Group 2
parameters.description: Select one of the input groups to combine with the group above, noting the setting of the Not (not2) parameter above.

parameters.name: op2
parameters.label: Operation
parameters.description: Select the operation used to combine the group specified in 2 parameter with the group specified in 3 parameter.

parameters.name: not3
parameters.label: Not
parameters.description: When Off, include the members of the group specified in 3 parameter below. When On, include all members that are not part of the group specified in 3 parameter below.

parameters.name: grp3
parameters.label: Group 3
parameters.description: Select one of the input groups to combine with the group combination above, noting the setting of the Not (not3) parameter above.

parameters.name: op3
parameters.label: Operation
parameters.description: Select the operation used to combine the group specified in 3 parameter with the group specified in 4 parameter.

parameters.name: not4
parameters.label: Not
parameters.description: When Off, include the members of the group specified in 4 parameter below. When On, include all members that are not part of the group specified in 4 parameter below.

parameters.name: grp4
parameters.label: Group 4
parameters.description: Select one of the input groups to combine with the group combination above, noting the setting of the Not (not4) parameter above.

parameters.name: cnvtype
parameters.label: Convert Type
parameters.description: Converts a group from a point group to a primitive group, and vice versa.

parameters.name: convertg
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: Name of the group to convert.

parameters.name: cnvtname
parameters.label: Convert Name
parameters.description: New group name.

parameters.name: preserve
parameters.label: Preserve Original
parameters.description: When checked, preserves original geometry.

parameters.name: oldname
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: Allows you to rename an existing group to something else.

parameters.name: newname
parameters.label: New Name
parameters.description: Allows you to rename an existing group to something else.

parameters.name: destroyname
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: Allows you to delete an existing point or primitive group.

parameters.name: tz
parameters.label: Tz
parameters.description: The X, Y, and Z coordinates of the center of the bounding volume.

parameters.name: rangeend
parameters.label: Rangeend
parameters.description: Activated when Operation is set to Group by Range. Select the start and end of the primitive/point number selection.

parameters.name: dirz
parameters.label: Dirz
parameters.description: The default values of 0, 1, 0 create a normal vector straight up in Y, which is perpendicular to the XZ plane, which becomes the primary axis. The 1, 0, 0 points the normal in positive X, giving a nor

parameters.name: sizez
parameters.label: Sizez
parameters.description: Dimensions of either the Bounding Box or Bounding Sphere in X, Y and Z.

parameters.name: select2
parameters.label: Select2
parameters.description: Activated when Operation is set to Group by Range. Select every nth occurrence of every mth entity in the above Start/End range.  For Example: entering 1 and 2 selects 1 out of every 2 entities.

examples.label: Configure Rangestart and Rangeend
examples.description: Common settings from 18 real Derivative examples
